subject: fix(build): remove unused RecurringVariability import from patterns.ts
body:
Vercel build failed with TS6196 — RecurringVariability was imported but
not referenced in the patterns engine (only used in models, wizard, and
classify step).

Tags: cleanup, build
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: variable-recurring-expenses
Semver: patch
